task: Migrated goals.md to append-only goals.jsonl JSONL format, verified data integrity, and pushed changes to main branch
discussion_summary: Session focused on converting the goals tracking system from markdown to JSONL for better merge safety and programmatic access. Verified that 40 unique goals were correctly preserved during migration, confirmed the stop hook had already discarded auto_suggested entries, tested the goals.py module functions, and completed the git workflow to commit and push the changes. The append-only JSONL structure ensures union-merge safety across concurrent developer sessions.

accomplishments.what: Converted goals.md to goals.jsonl with append-only JSONL structure
Verified 40 unique goals preserved and auto_suggested entries correctly discarded
Tested add_goal, complete_goal, and discard_goal functions in askr.state.goals module
Untracked goals.md from git and committed migration with descriptive message

next_actions.action: Commit the two uncommitted files: askr_state/implementation_state.md and askr_state/notifications.log with message 'docs: session log for goals.jsonl migration'
next_actions.why: Clean up working directory and preserve session history in version control

next_actions.action: Verify goals.jsonl is being read correctly by the CLI in next session by running 'askr goals list' and 'askr goals open'
next_actions.why: Ensure the migration is fully functional end-to-end in the user-facing interface

next_actions.action: Update any documentation or README that references goals.md to point to goals.jsonl instead
next_actions.why: Keep documentation in sync with implementation

decisions.decision: goals.md is now untracked and replaced by goals.jsonl as the source of truth
decisions.reason: JSONL format provides append-only semantics that are union-merge safe across concurrent developer sessions, unlike markdown

decisions.decision: Auto-suggested goals are discarded during migration and not preserved in goals.jsonl
decisions.reason: They are ephemeral and regenerated per session; preserving them would create noise and merge conflicts

relational_files.why: Module provides load_open_goals, add_goal, complete_goal, discard_goal functions used by CLI and checkpoint
CLI entry point that calls goals module functions; modified to use new JSONL structure
Stop hook that runs goal migration and cleanup; modified to handle JSONL format
Updated to ignore goals.md and ensure goals.jsonl is tracked
